must.title: Tab container has tablist role
must.description: The container element holding all tab elements must have role="tablist"

must.title: Each tab has tab role
must.description: Each tab element must have role="tab" and belong to the tablist

must.title: Each panel has tabpanel role
must.description: Each content section must have role="tabpanel" with a unique id

must.title: Tab references its panel
must.description: Each tab must have aria-controls pointing to the id of its associated tabpanel

must.title: Active tab has aria-selected
must.description: The active tab must have aria-selected="true"; inactive tabs must have aria-selected="false"

must.title: Arrow keys move between tabs
must.description: Left/Right Arrow keys must move focus between tabs; Tab key must move focus into the active panel

should.title: Panel labelled by its tab
should.description: Each tabpanel should have aria-labelledby referencing its controlling tab id

should.title: Use roving tabindex in tablist
should.description: Only the active tab should be in the natural tab order (tabindex="0"); others should have tabindex="-1"

should.title: Home/End keys jump to first/last tab
should.description: Home key should move focus to the first tab, End key to the last tab

avoid.title: Missing ARIA roles
avoid.description: Don't implement tabs with only CSS/JS without ARIA roles — screen readers won't recognize the pattern

avoid.title: Leaving inactive panels visible to screen readers
avoid.description: Inactive tab panels must be hidden (hidden attribute or display:none) so screen readers skip them

react.label: React Tabs

html.label: HTML Tabs
html.code:
Panel 1 content
Panel 2 content

tests.title: Arrow Key Navigation
steps: Press Right Arrow to move to next tab
Press Left Arrow to go back
Press Home/End to jump to first/last tab

tests.title: Screen Reader Announcement
steps: Verify each tab announces its label, role, and selected state
Activate a tab and verify the panel becomes accessible
